ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_level" INTEGER /* Level of the division (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team plays in */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team plays in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match was played in */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the match was played in */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team playing in the match */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team playing in the match */,
  "full_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team at full time */,
  "full_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team at full time */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (H, D, A for Home, Draw, Away) */,
  "half_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team at half time */,
  "half_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team at half time */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Result of the match at half time */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match to which the statistics belong */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Corners awarded to the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Corners awarded to the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards given to the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards given to the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards given to the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards given to the away team */,
  "home_pass_completion" TEXT /* Pass completion percentage of the home team */,
  "away_pass_completion" TEXT /* Pass completion percentage of the away team */,
  "home_pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Total pass attempts by the home team */,
  "away_pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Total pass attempts by the away team */,
  "home_dribbles" INTEGER /* Dribbles by the home team */,
  "away_dribbles" INTEGER /* Dribbles by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match to which the statistics belong */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards given to the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards given to the player */,
  "pass_completion" TEXT /* Pass completion percentage of the player */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Total pass attempts by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Dribbles by the player */,
  "dribble_success" TEXT /* Dribble success rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
